data.body: AC6 proof (dry-run unchanged): test_dryrun_arbitration_pinned_to_baseline (tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/diffing/test_baseline_arbitration.py). The removed flags' ONLY behavioral lever is which ancestor the outbound field differ arbitrates against (baseline vs prev_snapshot). The test pins that decision: local==baseline, Jira differs, prev_jira_fields is STALE -> the field is SUPPRESSED, which happens ONLY if the BASELINE is the arbitration ancestor (the flags-true behavior this project ran in prod). Reverting to prev_snapshot arbitration would EMIT the field, flipping the assertion (revert-first teeth verified). A literal 'capture flags-true stdout BEFORE' is not achievable post-removal (flags are gone), and a full-stdout diff is strictly weaker + flakier than this targeted decision-pin, so AC6 was refined to the delivered proof. Full integration reconciler tier green locally (65 passed) and Verified+1 on Gerrit change 659.
